specialty.name: Banana oleo saccharum
specialty.recipe: Macerate equal mass banana peels and cane sugar; let sit at room temperature, shaking occasionally, until sugar is completely dissolved' strain through nut milk bag or coffee filter to clarify

specialty.name: Banana Oloroso
specialty.recipe: Oloroso sherry infused with ripe, sliced bananas for 24–48 hours; strain. Makes 1 bottle per 2 bananas per 750ml sherry

specialty.name: Basil Fennel Syrup
specialty.recipe: 2:1 simple syrup steeped with fresh basil leaves and fennel fronds; strain after 30 min

specialty.name: Brown Butter Falernum
specialty.recipe: House falernum fat-washed with brown butter; see The NoMad Cocktail Book recipe

specialty.name: Cacao Nib-Infused Blanco Tequila
specialty.description: Cold-infused blanco tequila with cacao nibs

specialty.name: Cassia Cinnamon Syrup
specialty.recipe: 1:1 turbinado syrup infused with cassia cinnamon sticks; steep 24 hours

specialty.name: Ceylon Cinnamon Syrup
specialty.recipe: 1:1 simple syrup infused with Ceylon cinnamon sticks; steep 24 hours

specialty.name: Chai Infused Cocchi Vermouth di Torino
specialty.recipe: Cocchi Vermouth di Torino cold-infused with chai spices (cardamom, ginger, black pepper, cinnamon, clove) for 12 hours; strain

specialty.name: Chicken Jus
specialty.recipe: Reduced roasted chicken stock; roast chicken bones, simmer with aromatics 4–6 hours, reduce to glaze consistency

specialty.name: Coconut Syrup
specialty.recipe: 1:1 coconut water to cane sugar (or coconut sugar) (v/m)

specialty.name: Coffee Infused Angostura Bitters
specialty.recipe: Angostura bitters cold-infused with coarsely ground coffee for 4–6 hours; strain

specialty.name: Coffee Infused Dry Vermouth
specialty.recipe: Dry vermouth cold-infused with coarsely ground coffee for 10–12 hours; strain

specialty.name: Corn Syrup
specialty.recipe: 2:1 simple syrup made by simmering dried corn in water; strain and sweeten

specialty.name: Cranberry Syrup
specialty.recipe: 1:1 simple syrup simmered with fresh cranberries until jammy. Strain and brix adjust if desired.

specialty.name: Don's Remix
specialty.recipe:
- 125 g clarified grapefruit juice
- 125 g cane sugar
- 15 g grapefruit peel
- 7.5 g cinnamon bark, broken into pieces
- 2.625 g citric acid

Toast cinnamon bark in a small saucepan until just aromatic. Add the juice, peels, and sugar. Bring to a gentle simmer and cover for 15 minutes, stirring occassionaly and monitoring heat to avoid scorching. Let cool and string through a nut milk bag and then coffee filter. Stir in citric acid until dissolved. Makes 8 ounces.

See Tropical Standard p 150 for Don's Remix recipe.

specialty.name: Fig Leaf Syrup
specialty.recipe: 2:1 simple syrup infused with fresh fig leaves; steep 24 hours, strain

specialty.name: Ginger Lime Syrup
specialty.recipe: Combine ginger juice, fresh lime juice and 2:1 simple syrup 1:1:2 by volume

specialty.name: Grapefruit Oleo Saccharum
specialty.recipe: Macerate equal mass grapefruit peels and cane sugar; let sit at room temperature, shaking occasionally, until sugar is completely dissolved' strain through nut milk bag or coffee filter to clarify

specialty.name: Grapefruit Punch Syrup
specialty.recipe:
- 125 g clarified grapefruit juice
- 31.5 g grapefruit oleo saccharum
- 86.5 g cane sugar
- 1.5 g citric acid

Combine juice and oleo in blend on low, then slowly incorporate the sugar and acid. Makes 6 ounces.

See Tropical Standard p 216 for Grapefruit Punch Syrup Recipe.

specialty.name: Green Tea Yogurt Syrup
specialty.recipe: Strained full-fat yogurt sweetened with green tea–infused 2:1 simple syrup

specialty.name: Jalapeño Infused Agave Syrup
specialty.recipe: Agave nectar thinned 1:1 with water; steep sliced jalapeños 10–20 min to taste

specialty.name: Jalapeño Infused Tequila
specialty.recipe: Blanco tequila with sliced jalapeños (seeds in for heat); taste after 15 min, strain when desired spice level reached

specialty.name: Kabocha Squash Syrup
specialty.recipe: Roasted kabocha squash purée blended with 1:1 simple syrup, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice; strain

specialty.name: Lime oleo saccharum
specialty.recipe: Macerate equal mass lime peels and cane sugar; let sit at room temperature, shaking occasionally, until sugar is completely dissolved' strain through nut milk bag or coffee filter to clarify

specialty.name: Maple Shrub
specialty.description: 1:1 maple syrup to apple cider vinegar (v/v)

specialty.name: Passionfruit Syrup
specialty.recipe: 1:1 passionfruit purée to 2:1 simple syrup by volume; strain through coffee filter to clarify

specialty.name: Pineapple Gum (Gomme) Syrup
specialty.recipe:
- 125 g finely strained or clarified pineapple juice
- 12.5 g acacia gum (gum arabic)
- 87.5 g sugar of choice
- 0.5 g citric acid

Blend pineapple juice on low and slowly incorporate acacia gum; speed can be increased but try to limit foam production. Return to low speed and incorporate sugar and acid. Makes 6 oz.

See Tropical Standard p 197 for Gum Syrups.

specialty.name: Rhubarb Shrub
specialty.recipe: Rhubarb, sugar, and red wine vinegar macerated together; strain after 48 hours

specialty.name: Sarsaparilla Tincture/Bitters
specialty.recipe:
Dried sarsaparilla root steeped in high-proof neutral spirit for 2 weeks; strain and dilute to taste.

Bittercube Sarsaparilla bitters are an easier options.

specialty.name: Spiced Tomato Water
specialty.recipe: Strained juice of ripe tomatoes with salt, white pepper, celery seed and hot sauce; chill overnight

specialty.name: Spicy Ginger Syrup
specialty.recipe: Fresh ginger, juiced; combine with 2:1 simple syrup 1:1 by volume

specialty.name: Tellicherry Black Pepper Syrup
specialty.recipe: 2:1 simple syrup infused with cracked Tellicherry peppercorns; steep 30 min

specialty.name: Thai Bird Chile–Infused Aperol
specialty.recipe: Aperol with sliced Thai bird chiles; steep 15–30 min to taste, strain

specialty.name: Vanilla Syrup
specialty.recipe: 2:1 simple syrup (by weight) with 2 split vanilla beans; steep 24 hours
